title: rhynchospora capitellata var. minor
intro: Rhynchospora capitellata var. minor, also known as Dwarf Beak-rush, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae) that is native to tropical and subtropical regions. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rhynchospora capitellata var. minor are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water or using them in a decoction to create a medicinal tea.
